top_signals.title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as Oil Falls Below $90: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rebound on Wall Street powered ahead, with stocks joining bonds higher as oil fell amid hopes the US and Iran are getting closer to a deal to end the war that has rattled global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Airbus Unsure of Reaching A320 Target Because of Pratt Problems
top_signals.summary: Airbus SE is unsure of reaching next year’s production target for its best-selling A320 jet because Pratt & Whitney may not be able to supply enough engines, the planemaker’s chief executive officer said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Old people and children are quite similar’: China’s silver economy shines as births plunge - Financial Times

top_signals.title: Mosaic Clinical Technologies™ Launches Mosaic Reporting™, an AI-Native Reporting Platform Built for Radiology Workflows
top_signals.summary: Part of MosaicOS, Mosaic Reporting brings a new class of ambient AI, natural dictation and real-time report construction to radiology workflows, helping healthcare organizations expand capacity, reduce reporting friction and move beyond legacy systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: East of England Co-op Eliminates Downtime Across 200 Sites with TNS Secure SD-WAN
top_signals.summary: Retailer deploys TNS solution to strengthen resilience, simplify operations and support future digital growth
